name: Lucille Ball
title: Last known photo of Lucille Ball, taken on March 29, 1989, at the Academy Awards — she died less than a month later.
description: Lucille Ball was photographed on March 29, 1989, at the 61st Academy Awards ceremony at the Shrine Auditorium in Los Angeles, where she appeared as a presenter alongside Bob Hope. It was her last public appearance, and audience members noted she appeared frail but in good spirits. Less than a month later, on April 18, Ball suffered an acute aortic aneurysm and underwent emergency open-heart surgery at Cedars-Sinai Medical Center. She initially recovered well, but on the morning of April 26, she suffered a second aortic dissection and died within minutes. She was 77 years old.
bio: Lucille Ball was an American actress, comedian, and producer, best known for starring in "I Love Lucy". She was a pioneer of television comedy and one of the first women to run a major television studio.
